_comment: Mixed items[]: a content-ref (item 0) and a collection-ref (item 1). Schema interpreter normalizes both. The collection-ref's stringified-JSON collection_metadata + collection_recipes get parsed; the nested collection_content[] entries are recursively normalized. Engine layer asserts the standalone song renders [content, chrome] (default) and the collection-ref item itself doesn't pin a layer plan — collection-ref rendering is layer-selector's segment-title-card territory (not yet shipped; deferred to Phase 3 chapter bar work). For Phase 0c, this fixture validates the schema-layer projection only.
